scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.start: concurrently --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm --prefix frontend run preview" "npm --prefix backend start"
